response: Rewrite a business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL. In 2002, a real estate team was established to offer agency expertise for both sellers and buyers in commercial and residential properties. The organization serves homeowners and business owners as a trusted advisor for all aspects of real estate and financing, aiming to maintain client relationships for a lifetime. The team operates as a small group of real estate experts serving the following locations: Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, the Lake Nona region, and Lancaster Park, collectively known as Central Florida.
